top_signals.title: Pentagon expands list of China military-linked firms to include Alibaba, Baidu in fresh blow to diplomatic thaw
top_signals.summary: The Pentagon briefly posted a similar expanded list in February, then withdrew it without explanation before Trump's China trip.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China’s Coking Coal Hits Down Limit After Report on Output Push
top_signals.summary: Chinese coking coal futures hit the daily down limit following a report that Shaanxi authorities asked miners to maintain output, after a deadly accident in neighboring Shanxi last month raised supply and safety concerns.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Electric vehicle giant BYD predicts 80% of China car sales will soon be electric
top_signals.summary: BYD expects China's competitive electric vehicle market to continue growing, even as manufacturers and analysts anticipate domestic demand to taper further.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iceye Valuation Jumps to €10 Billion in Funding Round Led by General Atlantic
top_signals.summary: Iceye Oy quadrupled its valuation to more than €10 billion ($11.5 billion) in a General Atlantic-led funding round that will help the Finnish satellite-intelligence company expand to meet demand for sovereign technology systems.

top_signals.title: UK's GSK to acquire U.S. drugmaker Nuvalent for $10.6 billion as pharma giants race to expand pipelines
top_signals.summary: The deal comes at a time of biotech dealmaking frenzy, driven by looming patent cliffs, newly buoyant public markets and drugmakers' race to bolster pipelines.
